title: LATAM Telemedicine White-Label Infrastructure
problem: Every healthcare company in LATAM wants to add telemedicine, but building from scratch is expensive. No white-label telemedicine infrastructure providers. Companies either build custom (slow, expensive) or use generic video tools (not HIPAA-compliant, no healthcare features). No easy way to integrate video consults into existing healthcare apps.
solution: White-label telemedicine platform. Embeddable video consultation widget. Complete backend (scheduling, payments, EMR integration, prescriptions). Developer API. Customizable branding. Compliance built-in. Twilio Video + healthcare features. 'Stripe for telemedicine' model.
technology: WebRTC video, API-first architecture, embeddable widgets, EMR integrations, payment processing, compliance layer
target_customer: Healthcare app developers, hospital systems, insurers, pharmaceutical companies (tele-detailing), telemedicine startups
traction_signals: Every healthcare company adding virtual care
regulatory_notes: Telemedicine regulations vary by country, medical device regulations for diagnostic features
varden_fit: CRITICAL FIT - Infrastructure layer for telemedicine. Developer API business model. Highly scalable. This is exactly what Varden should build.
notes: CONTRARIAN + BOREALING: Building telemedicine infrastructure for others to use. Incredibly boring. But it's the picks and shovels of telemedicine boom. API businesses have amazing margins.
